name: HTML Output
description: Convert content-writer Markdown to HTML. Supports schema.org Organization JSON-LD injection, [#n] citation-to-superscript conversion with Sources section, CSS templates (basic/article), and full HTML document wrapping for standalone pages or email.
usage_notes: Enable schema_org for SEO. Use css_template 'article' for standalone preview pages. Set wrap_in_document for complete HTML files (email, standalone hosting).

options.name: include_schema_org
options.label: Include schema.org JSON-LD
options.description: Generate schema.org Organization markup from analysis data.

options.name: include_sources_section
options.label: Include Sources section
options.description: Convert [#n] citations to superscript anchor links with a Sources section.

options.name: wrap_in_document
options.label: Full HTML document
options.description: Wrap output in <!DOCTYPE html> with <head>/<body>. Disable for HTML fragment.
